PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'D:\\Downloads\\GILD-Austin-May26-NameTags-v1 \(1\).html' -Encoding UTF8; for \($i = 467; $i -le 490; $i++\) { $line = $content[$i]; if \($line -and $line.Length -gt 100\) { Write-Output \("L$\($i+1\): " + $line.Substring\(0,100\) + "..."\) } elseif \($line\) { Write-Output \("L$\($i+1\): " + $line\) } })
